Hero.greeting: Hi, I am Nguyễn Kim Thi
Hero.headline: Engineering
Hero.description: Crafting robust backends and scalable architectures. Specializing in high-performance Java and PHP systems with a focus on clean code and technical excellence.
Hero.terminalUpToDate: Your branch is up to date with 'origin/master'.

About.title: About Me
About.p1: I am a passionate Backend Developer with a rigorous focus on building efficient, secure, and scalable server-side applications. My approach combines engineering precision with creative problem-solving.
About.p2: Having worked with industry leaders like <brand>Kaopiz Software</brand> and <brand>Ngân Giang Technology</brand>, I've honed my skills in modernizing legacy systems and architecting new solutions from the ground up.
About.p3: I thrive in environments that challenge technical boundaries, whether it's optimizing complex database queries or implementing advanced image retrieval algorithms.

kaopiz.description: Contributing to high-scale backend services and system architecture. Implementing robust APIs and ensuring seamless integration between services.

nganGiang.description: Focused on SIFMES project development. Specialized in C# SOAP services and 3D Point Cloud data analysis, contributing to precision engineering software.

manga.title: Smart Manga Platform
manga.description: An intelligent comic reader platform featuring OCR for text extraction and Text-to-Speech integration. Built with Spring Boot for the core engine and Next.js for a seamless frontend experience.

imageRetrieval.title: Texture-Based Image Retrieval
imageRetrieval.description: Content-based image retrieval system using Gabor filters for texture analysis. Led a team of developers to implement efficient search algorithms in C#.

Contact.title: Get In Touch
Contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities to be part of your visions.
